title: Sabash
desc: Srinivasan, a man who is blind, and his friend Dharan discover the body of Cheenu's wife, Shanti. Initially, the police regard it as a suicide but new evidence suggests foul play.

title: Kadal Pookkal
desc: Two friends, Karuthaiya and Peter, find their bond tested when a personal tragedy strikes one of their families, leading them on a quest for justice.

title: Kasthuri Maan
desc: Arun, a district collector, promises to marry Uma who helped him pass his IAS exams. Things take a bad turn when Uma ends up in jail, unsure about her future and their relationship.

title: Thedinen Vanthathu
desc: A man and his friend try to save a bag containing a hefty sum, which they hide in an empty house. When they return for the bag, the house is occupied by a girl and her family.

title: Kadal Pookkal
desc: Two friends, Karuthaiya and Peter, find their bond tested when a personal tragedy strikes one of their families, leading them on a quest for justice.
